_publications._publicationTitle: Multiomic analyses reveal new targets of polycomb repressor complex 2 in Schwann lineage cells and malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors.

_contextSnippet: In a 48-h assay, the knockdown of NOTCH receptors individually decreased proliferation when compared with siNT
details: Knockdown of NOTCH receptors individually decreased proliferation in 48-h assay
